mapper.select: SELECT PARAM_CD, PARAM_NM, PARAM_VAL FROM SYS_PARAMETER WHERE PARAM_CD = #{code}

SELECT ID, DICT_TYPE, DICT_LABEL, DICT_VALUE, SORT_NUM, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, DICT_ENG_LABEL FROM M_DICT_DATA WHERE DICT_TYPE = 'WORK_SCHEDULE' AND STATUS = '1' ORDER BY SORT_NUM
